motto: Ascertain, study, catalog — world's best Dewey war library on GitHub

books.title: On War
books.author: Carl von Clausewitz
books.subject: military_theory
books.study_note: Friction, center of gravity, war as continuation of politics.

books.title: The Art of War (Jomini)
books.author: Antoine Henri Jomini
books.subject: military_strategy
books.study_note: Lines of operation, decisive points — Napoleonic doctrine.

books.title: Commentaries on the Gallic War
books.author: Julius Caesar
books.subject: military_history
books.study_note: Campaign narrative — logistics, tribal alliances, Roman discipline.

books.title: The Histories
books.author: Herodotus
books.subject: military_history
books.study_note: Persian Wars, Thermopylae, Salamis — historic measures.

books.title: Personal Memoirs of U. S. Grant
books.author: Ulysses S. Grant
books.subject: civil_war
books.study_note: Union command perspective — Vicksburg, Appomattox, leadership.

books.title: The Red Badge of Courage
books.author: Stephen Crane
books.subject: civil_war_fiction
books.study_note: Psychology of combat — fear, courage, unit cohesion.

books.title: The Influence of Sea Power Upon History
books.author: Alfred Thayer Mahan
books.subject: naval_warfare
books.study_note: Sea lanes, fleet concentration, geopolitical choke points.

books.title: The Story of Siegfried
books.author: James Baldwin
books.subject: war_epic
books.study_note: Norse heroic warfare — dragon-slaying, oaths, fate.

books.title: War and Peace
books.author: Leo Tolstoy
books.subject: napoleonic_wars
books.study_note: Napoleon's invasion of Russia — grand strategy vs. individual fate.

books.title: All Quiet on the Western Front
books.author: Erich Maria Remarque
books.subject: world_war_i
books.study_note: WWI trench warfare — dehumanization, lost generation.

books.title: Treaty of Versailles (text)
books.author: Allied Powers
books.subject: world_war_i
books.study_note: Peace settlement — reparations, territorial changes, League.

books.title: OpenStax U.S. History
books.author: OpenStax
books.subject: us_military_history
books.study_note: Civil War through modern conflicts — OER textbook.

books.title: OpenStax World History Volume 1
books.author: OpenStax
books.subject: world_military_history
books.study_note: Ancient through early modern warfare — OER.
